member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.RAGController
member.summary: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) API endpoints for document management and querying

member.name: M:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.RAGController.AddDocument(RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.AddDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Add a new document to the vector store
member.returns: The created document with its embedding and unique ID
member.response: Document successfully added to the vector store
Internal server error occurred while processing the document

member.name: M:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.RAGController.Query(RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryRequest)
member.summary: Query the RAG system with a question
member.param: Query text and number of documents to retrieve
member.returns: AI-generated answer based on retrieved relevant documents
member.response: Successfully generated answer from retrieved context
Internal server error occurred while processing the query

member.name: M:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.RAGController.UploadDocuments(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFileCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Upload one or more document files to the vector store
member.param: The document files to upload (PDF, TXT, DOCX)
Optional category for all uploaded files
Optional source identifier for all uploaded files
member.returns: Upload results with successfully processed documents and any errors
member.response: Files processed (check response for individual file results)
No files provided or invalid request

member.name: M:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.RAGController.GetSupportedFileTypes
member.summary: Get list of supported file types for upload

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.AddDocumentRequest
member.summary: Request model for adding a new document

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.AddDocumentRequest.Content
member.summary: The text content of the document
member.example: The capital of France is Paris. It is known for the Eiffel Tower.

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.AddDocumentRequest.Metadata
member.summary: Optional metadata key-value pairs for the document

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.ErrorResponse
member.summary: Error response model

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.ErrorResponse.Error
member.summary: Error message

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Controllers.ErrorResponse.Details
member.summary: Detailed error information

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Examples.RAGExamples
member.summary: Example scenarios for using the RAG API

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.Document
member.summary: Represents a document stored in the vector database

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.Document.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the document

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.Document.Content
member.summary: The text content of the document

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.Document.Metadata
member.summary: Custom metadata associated with the document

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.Document.Embedding
member.summary: Vector embedding representation of the document content

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadResponse
member.summary: Response model for file upload operations

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadResponse.Documents
member.summary: List of successfully processed documents

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadResponse.Errors
member.summary: List of files that failed to process

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadResponse.TotalFiles
member.summary: Total number of files uploaded

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadResponse.SuccessCount
member.summary: Number of successfully processed files

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadResponse.FailureCount
member.summary: Number of failed files

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadError
member.summary: Represents an error that occurred during file upload

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadError.FileName
member.summary: Name of the file that failed

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.FileUploadError.Error
member.summary: Error message describing what went wrong

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryRequest
member.summary: Request model for querying the RAG system

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryRequest.Query
member.summary: The question or search query
member.example: What is the capital of France?

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryRequest.TopK
member.summary: Number of most relevant documents to retrieve (default: 3)

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryResponse
member.summary: Response model containing the AI-generated answer and retrieved documents

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryResponse.Answer
member.summary: The AI-generated answer based on retrieved context

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.QueryResponse.RetrievedDocuments
member.summary: List of documents retrieved from the vector store

member.name: T:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.RetrievedDocument
member.summary: Represents a document retrieved from the vector store with similarity score

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.RetrievedDocument.Content
member.summary: The content of the retrieved document

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.RetrievedDocument.Similarity
member.summary: Cosine similarity score between query and document (0-1)

member.name: P:RAGImplementationAPI.Models.RetrievedDocument.Metadata
member.summary: Metadata associated with the document

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
